title: Soroban Debugger Symbolic Replay Bundle
description: JSON schema for symbolic replay bundles exported from the soroban-debug symbolic analyzer. This bundle captures the configuration and metadata needed to reproduce a symbolic execution run.

schema_version.description: The version of this schema. Current version is 1. Used to track compatibility and allow evolution of the bundle format.

command.description: The command that generated this bundle. Always 'symbolic' for replay bundles.

contract.description: Information about the contract being analyzed.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the contract WASM file. Used to verify that the bundle applies to the correct contract.

path_hint.description: Optional file path hint for locating the original contract WASM file. Not authoritative; use sha256 for verification.

invocation.description: Information about the function being analyzed.

function.description: Name of the exported contract function that was analyzed.

config.description: Symbolic exploration configuration. All fields are optional and default to the balanced profile when omitted.

seed.description: Seed used to shuffle input combinations during exploration. When provided, ensures deterministic and reproducible runs. Passing this value to --replay or --seed reproduces the identical exploration order.

max_paths.description: Maximum number of distinct execution paths to record. Exploration stops when this limit is reached.

max_input_combinations.description: Maximum number of input combinations to generate deterministically before exploration begins.

max_breadth.description: Legacy alias for controlling generated-value branching width. Preserved for backward compatibility.

max_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth for symbolic exploration.

timeout_secs.description: Timeout in seconds for the entire symbolic exploration. Exploration stops when this limit is reached.

storage_seed.description: Optional initial storage state to seed the symbolic exploration. Allows testing how different storage states affect contract behavior.

format.description: Format of the storage seed data. Currently only 'json' is supported.

data.description: Storage seed data as a JSON string. Should be a valid JSON object representing the key-value storage state.

metadata.description: Optional metadata about the execution results.

paths_explored.description: Number of distinct execution paths discovered.

panics_found.description: Number of execution paths that resulted in panics.
